title: MLM Main Menu Logo
description: A Simple Texture Pack That Replaces The Minecraft Main Menu logo To Be The MLM Flag
body:
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OtiYU6sn/images/3b05055dae3391db1e910a5d82587e9b18010552.png)

A simple texture pack that replaces the Minecraft main menu Logo with the mlm (men loving men) Flag!
